heading: Special diabetes programs for Indians

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall make grants for providing services for the prevention and treatment of diabetes in accordance with subsection (b).

children.heading: Services through Indian health facilities
children.label: b Services through Indian health facilities

children.text: An Indian health program operated by an Indian tribe or tribal organization pursuant to a contract, grant, cooperative agreement, or compact with the Indian Health Service pursuant to the Indian Self-Determination Act [ et seq.].25 U.S.C. 5321

An urban Indian health program operated by an urban Indian organization pursuant to a grant or contract with the Indian Health Service pursuant to title V of the Indian Health Care Improvement Act [ et seq.].25 U.S.C. 1651

children.heading: Transferred funds
children.label: 1 Transferred funds
children.text: Notwithstanding , from the amounts appropriated in such section for each of fiscal years 1998 through 2002, $30,000,000, to remain available until expended, is hereby transferred and made available in such fiscal year for grants under this section.section 1397dd(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: $70,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2001 and 2002 (which shall be combined with amounts transferred under paragraph (1) for each such fiscal years);

children.label: C
children.text: $150,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2004 through 2017;

children.label: D
children.text: $150,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2018 through 2023, to remain available until expended;

children.label: E
children.text: $155,619,196 for fiscal year 2024, to remain available until expended;

children.label: F
children.text: $159,228,188 for fiscal year 2025, to remain available until expended;

children.label: G
children.text: $200,000,000 for fiscal year 2026, to remain available until expended; and

children.label: H
children.text: $50,410,959 for the period beginning on , and ending on , to remain available until expended.October 1, 2026December 31, 2026
